    ]
  },
  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c-genai-apps", "name": "Generative AI applications", "aliases": ["generative AI"], "description": "AI systems that generate responses and enable natural-language interaction with public data.", "grounding_span": "Generative AI applications offer transformative opportunities", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-llm", "name": "Large language models", "aliases": ["LLMs", "LLM"], "description": "Language models whose ability to interpret and respond about federal statistical data is being evaluated.", "grounding_span": "large language models (LLMs)", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-fed-stat-data", "name": "Federal statistical data", "aliases": ["federal statistical data assets"], "description": "Publicly available statistical data assets produced by federal agencies.", "grounding_span": "improve the AI-readiness of federal statistical data by", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-open-gov-data", "name": "Open government data assets", "aliases": ["open Government data assets"], "description": "Government data assets defined in statute, including datasets and accompanying contextual information.", "grounding_span": "Open government data assets are defined in statute", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-metadata", "name": "Metadata", "aliases": [], "description": "Contextual information associated with data assets that influences how an LLM interprets a dataset.", "grounding_span": "and their associated metadata", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-rich-metadata", "name": "Rich metadata", "aliases": [], "description": "Detailed metadata agencies capture and store to enable usage, management, cataloging, discovery, and interoperability.", "grounding_span": "capture and store rich metadata about their data assets", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-ai-readiness", "name": "AI-readiness", "aliases": ["AI readiness", "AI-ready"], "description": "The extent to which a data asset is prepared for effective analysis and querying by AI systems, particularly LLMs.", "grounding_span": "AI-readiness of federal statistical data", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-ai-readiness-criteria", "name": "AI-readiness criteria", "aliases": [], "description": "Criteria for assessing and improving the AI compatibility of federal statistical data.", "grounding_span": "developing AI-readiness criteria", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-prompt-response-pairs", "name": "Prompt-response pairs", "aliases": [], "description": "Curated domain-specific pairs against which LLM-generated responses are compared and evaluated.", "grounding_span": "prompt-response pairs", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-accuracy", "name": "Accuracy", "aliases": [], "description": "A quality dimension of LLM responses to federal statistical prompts.", "grounding_span": "the accuracy, relevancy, and explainability of", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-relevancy", "name": "Relevancy", "aliases": [], "description": "A quality dimension of LLM responses to federal statistical prompts.", "grounding_span": "the accuracy, relevancy, and explainability of", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-explainability", "name": "Explainability", "aliases": [], "description": "A quality dimension of LLM responses to federal statistical prompts.", "grounding_span": "the accuracy, relevancy, and explainability of", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-statistical-accuracy", "name": "Statistical accuracy", "aliases": [], "description": "A high bar of correctness an LLM must meet when responding about statistical data.", "grounding_span": "meet a high bar of statistical accuracy", "location": "The Current Request for Solutions"},
    {"id": "c-machine-readability", "name": "Machine-readability", "aliases": [], "description": "An improvable property of federal statistical data assets supporting LLM interaction.", "grounding_span": "accessibility, and machine-readability", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-machine-interpretable", "name": "Machine-interpretable formats", "aliases": [], "description": "Formats into which public datasets are transformed to be interpretable by AI.", "grounding_span": "machine-\ninterpretable formats", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-nsds", "name": "National Secure Data Service", "aliases": ["NSDS"], "description": "A future shared federal data service within which the AI-readiness tool may be offered.", "grounding_span": "future National Secure Data Service", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-shared-service", "name": "Shared service", "aliases": [], "description": "A service offered to federal agencies within a future NSDS.", "grounding_span": "part of a shared service within a future", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-mcp", "name": "Model Context Protocol", "aliases": ["MCP"], "description": "An emerging standard being assessed to increase system interoperability.", "grounding_span": "emerging standards like the Model Context", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-apis", "name": "APIs", "aliases": [], "description": "Interfaces enhanced with metadata and context to improve LLM results.", "grounding_span": "enhancing APIs with metadata and context", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-sme", "name": "Subject-matter expertise", "aliases": [], "description": "Domain expertise required to generate or evaluate accurate responses about federal statistical data.", "grounding_span": "requires subject-matter expertise of", "location": "Key Evidence-Building Considerations"},
    {"id": "c-data-stewards", "name": "Data stewards", "aliases": [], "description": "Stakeholders engaged to help create the collection of prompt-response pairs.", "grounding_span": "subject-matter experts and data stewards", "location": "Deliverables"},
    {"id": "c-performance-metrics", "name": "Performance metrics", "aliases": [], "description": "Quantifiable metrics that evaluate the quality of LLM responses.", "grounding_span": "quantifiable performance metrics", "location": "Information Gaps"},
    {"id": "c-empirical-eval", "name": "Empirical evaluation", "aliases": [], "description": "An empirical (rather than theoretical) evaluation of LLM performance with federal statistical data.", "grounding_span": "an empirical evaluation of LLM", "location": "Information Gaps"},
    {"id": "c-structured-data", "name": "Structured data", "aliases": ["tabular data"], "description": "Structured data formats such as tabular data.", "grounding_span": "structured (e.g., tabular)", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-unstructured-data", "name": "Unstructured data", "aliases": [], "description": "Unstructured data formats such as reports.", "grounding_span": "unstructured (e.g., reports) formats", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "c-open-source-tool", "name": "Open-source tool", "aliases": [], "description": "An open-source, publicly accessible tool automating and applying the AI-readiness evaluation.", "grounding_span": "an open-source and publicly accessible tool", "location": "The Current Request for Solutions"},
    {"id": "c-data-quality", "name": "Data quality", "aliases": [], "description": "The quality of federal statistical data, a factor in LLM response accuracy.", "grounding_span": "the quality of federal statistical data", "location": "Key Evidence-Building Considerations"},
    {"id": "c-metadata-quality", "name": "Metadata quality", "aliases": [], "description": "An improvable property of data assets supporting LLM interaction.", "grounding_span": "metadata quality, accessibility", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "c-interoperability", "name": "Interoperability", "aliases": [], "description": "A goal enabled by rich metadata and data cataloging.", "grounding_span": "data cataloging, discovery, and interoperability", "location": "Background"}
  ],
  "definitions": [
    {"id": "d-ai-readiness", "term": "AI-readiness", "verbatim_text": "For the purposes of this project, “AI-readiness” refers to the extent to which a data asset is prepared for effective analysis and querying by AI systems, particularly LLMs. This includes data quality, access, formatting, and metadata.", "normative_status": "policy", "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "“AI-readiness” refers to the extent to which a data asset is prepared for effective", "location": "Background footnote 2"}
  ],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl-transformative", "claim_text": "Generative AI applications offer transformative opportunities for how Americans interact with public data.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Generative AI applications offer transformative opportunities", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "cl-barriers", "claim_text": "Natural-language and chat-based interfaces reduce technical barriers and expand accessibility of public data to a broader range of users.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "expanding the accessibility of public data to a broader range of users.", "location": "Key Objective"},
    {"id": "cl-strides", "claim_text": "The federal government has made great strides in developing best practices for AI-ready data.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "The federal government has made great strides in developing best practices for AI-ready data", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "cl-commerce-pub", "claim_text": "In January 2025 the U.S. Department of Commerce published Generative AI and Open Data: Guidelines and Best Practices.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "In January 2025, the U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) published Generative AI and Open", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "cl-dcat", "claim_text": "The guidance recommends federal agencies update their metadata to comply with the DCAT-US 3.0 standard.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "recommends federal agencies update their metadata to comply with the DCAT-US 3.0 standard.", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "cl-fcsm", "claim_text": "The FCSM has published a call to action to improve the AI-readiness of federal statistical data.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Federal Committee on Statistical Methodology (FCSM) has published a call to action", "location": "Background"},
    {"id": "cl-ai-ready-enable", "claim_text": "AI-ready data enable LLMs to generate meaningful insights from both structured and unstructured formats.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "AI-ready data enable LLMs to generate meaningful insights from both structured", "location": "Background footnote 2"},
    {"id": "cl-must-enrich", "claim_text": "The federal government must optimize and enrich its data assets with appropriate context for the AI ecosystem.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "must optimize and enrich its data assets with the appropriate context", "location": "Key Objective"}
  ],

    {"id": "i-ai-readiness-eval", "name": "AI-readiness evaluation", "owner": "National Secure Data Service (NSDS) / U.S. Department of Commerce", "year": null, "method": "Comparison of LLM-generated responses against a curated collection of domain-specific prompt-response pairs.", "grounding_span": "An AI-readiness evaluation that measures how effectively an LLM interacts with Commerce", "location": "Deliverables"}

  ]
